mapper.select: SELECT * FROM train WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY departure_time
SELECT * FROM train WHERE departure LIKE CONCAT('%', #{departure}, '%') AND destination LIKE CONCAT('%', #{destination}, '%') AND status = 1 ORDER BY departure_time
mapper.update: UPDATE train SET available_seats = #{count} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE train SET available_seats = available_seats + #{count} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE train SET available_seats = available_seats - #{count} WHERE id = #{id} AND available_seats >= #{count}
